name: World of Arcane RPG
description:
Free RPG world, play as you want. The world of Arcane awaits you. NSFW Possible!

After dying in the real world, you come face to face with the Celestial of Fate Soraka, who sends you into the world of Runeterra and to Piltover and Zaun. You have the choice, where you want to get reborn and as who. Enjoy.

P.s. I know a Isekai start is cheap, but couldn't think of anything better >.<

This is my first bot ever and I tried my best to make it not speak for you. Please remember to use Chat Memory since it could get too much for the bot to remember everything. If the bot describes things, that don't make sense, correct him or generate its answer new.

All art belongs to Riot Games
creator: KSFemboy
